description: A company wants to book a small meeting room for 10 people for tomorrow.

nodes.task_description: Check the booking calendar for meeting room availability for the next day.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that Meeting Room C is available.

nodes.task_description: Provide the client with the last-minute rental rate.
Confirm the booking and process the full payment immediately via credit card.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent books the room and takes payment.

nodes.task_description: Notify the operations team of the last-minute booking so the room can be prepared.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends an urgent notification to the operations staff.
